## Describe the Bug
A clear description of what the bug is.

## Zap Code That Causes the Bug
```zap
// paste your .zp code here
```

## Expected Behavior
What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior
What actually happened (paste error message if any).

## Environment
- OS: [e.g. macOS, Windows, Linux]
- Node.js version: [e.g. 20.0.0]
- Zap version: [e.g. 1.0.0]
